## PrivaCI v0.1.0-beta.5

Plugin contract hooks — pipeline invokes ``UsageMeter.register_run`` before
recording a new run and ``final_meter`` on successful completion.

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:0.1.0-beta.5
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:beta    # rolling beta head

helm install privaci oci://ghcr.io/boundarylogic/charts/privaci --version 0.1.0-beta.5

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v0.1.0-beta.5"
```

Docs: https://boundarylogic.github.io/privaci/

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
